text: I feel the familiar quietude of a modern, institutional space — clinical, geometric, calmly lit. Passing through glass doors into the vibrant display, I am surrounded by symbols of research and innovation. The "R+D" wall and the written reflections evoke a sense of anticipation and curiosity within me. Here, questions hang in the air, blending uncertainty with possibility. I am aware of my own movement: tentative, thoughtful, and slightly self-conscious. The environment invites me to reflect on creation, ambiguity, and the mood of those who came before. I feel both a participant and an observer, suspended in thoughtful optimism.
